title: Moult shared definitions
description: Definitions shared across Moult's protected output contracts (hotspots, deadcode) so the confidence model and source spans cannot drift between them.

unit_interval.description: A confidence in [0, 1]. Findings are confidence-graded, never asserted as certain death.

confidence.description: Reserved nullable confidence slot. Null where an analysis does not (yet) assert a confidence; otherwise a value in [0, 1].

span.description: Definition source range. Lines 1-based, columns 0-based (Prism offsets).

runtime.description: Runtime coverage classification for a symbol. hot=an executable body line ran; cold=tracked file, no body line ran; untracked=no signal (file absent from the dataset, a constant, or unclassifiable). Null where no coverage was merged. Evidence, never an assertion of certain death.

coverage_source.description: Provenance of merged runtime coverage. Null where no coverage was merged.

provider_source.description: Provenance of a merged feature-flag provider snapshot (--provider). Null where no snapshot was merged. The flags analogue of coverage_source: evidence about which keys the provider knows, never a claim a flag is certainly stale.
